scenario: Bertie-class pre-state — caller exists with a single SIM_CALL drop (counts=false, lfn=NULL) then no real calls yet. Compose-header reader must narrate '(call #1)' for the first real VOICE_CALL.

capturedFrom.db: synthetic — Bertie-class shape, not pulled from live hf_sandbox
capturedFrom.method: Constructed so the cutover reader (nextLearnerFacingNumber loader) reads 1 even though sequenceNumber=1 was already burned by the sim drop.

preExistingSimDrop.scenario: Bertie's hf_sandbox 09:55 sim drop — 6s duration, transcript empty

scenarioNarrative: Caller has burned SIM_CALL sequence=1 but it doesn't count. nextLearnerFacingNumber loader reads MAX(learnerFacingNumber WHERE counts=true)=NULL, returns 0+1=1. Composing the first real call must render '(call #1)' — not '(call #2)' which is what the pre-Slice-4 callCount-based reader produced.
